title: A New Island Becomes Necessary
description: On pages 16–19, a new island becomes necessary as nami falls seriously ill after Little Garden, forcing the crew to abandon the direct route to Alabasta and search for a doctor.
scene: A New Island Becomes Necessary. Nami falls seriously ill after Little Garden, forcing the crew to abandon the direct route to Alabasta and search for a doctor. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: your shares are in the kitchen.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: If only I could have cut that "Candle- wax"...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Then there wouldn't have been any trouble.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So I can even cut through iron...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The Swanda is ready to set sail.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Filing, Filing, just pipe down already!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Jeez Louise! Why do I have to go!? Can't you boys take care of little ol' Mr. 3?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: T-there's no way! Even if all of us attacked him at once, it'd be impossible!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: p-please sir...! it's the boss' order!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Mr. O can be so bothersome!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sorry, VIVI... I'm going to take a little... break...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's fine. I'll be keeping a close eye on the log pose.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So just go to your room and take a nice R...

summary: This part centers on a new island becomes necessary, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
